title: Nether Forest Upgrade
description: Spice up your nether with this pack that adds hanging wart on the bottom of crimson and warped trees!
body:
![Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f8e3871a8e68c4f9c0bc9b27740e0f6cccae8b.png)
# Description
➡️ This resource pack adds a new decorative feature to nether wart and warped wart blocks: Hanging Wart. The plant shows on the underside of any column of warped/nether wart blocks, and is the perfect way to spice up your nether experience; turning a normally boring average biome into a perfect integration into the minecract nether, without straying too far from that beloved vanilla feel.

- ➡️ 2 New features: Hanging nether wart and Hanging warped wart.
- ➡️ Spice up your playthrough: This pack integrates these biomes perfectly into the nether.
- ➡️ Enjoy! 😎

### Crimson Forest (Taken with [Bliss Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader/versions)):
**[View the gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hanging-wart/gallery)**
